headline: The
description: A disciplined, four-phase process engineered to move you from concept to launch without the runaround.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We dig into your problem, your workflow, and your vision. No pitch deck required — just an honest conversation.

steps.title: Blueprint & Estimate
steps.description: You receive a detailed technical blueprint with fixed pricing. No surprises. No scope creep.

steps.title: Build Sprint
steps.description: We build in focused sprints with weekly demos. You see working software, not slide decks.

steps.title: Launch & Handoff
steps.description: Your software goes live on your infrastructure. You own everything — code, data, the entire system.
